hooks.command: echo 'POST-COMPACT REMINDER: Auto-delegate to agents: requirements-interviewer (features/specs), codebase-researcher (repo exploration), deep-research-analyst (web research), refactor-orchestrator (large refactors), codex-challenger (validation). Codex sidekick must be consulted for all non-trivial work.'

hooks.prompt: Review the conversation so far. Was this session trivial (simple question, reading files, small typo fix) or non-trivial (feature work, refactoring, code review, architecture, spec writing, planning, research)? If non-trivial: was Codex consulted at least once (via codex-challenger agent, codex-challenge.sh, codex-review.sh, or codex-web-search.sh)? If non-trivial work was done WITHOUT any Codex validation, return {"ok": false, "reason": "Non-trivial work completed without Codex validation. Run a Codex challenge loop before finishing: use the codex-challenger agent or .claude/helpers/codex-challenge.sh."}. Otherwise return {"ok": true}.
